{{Quote|An evil wizard of the Night Spirit!|[[Logray/Legends|Logray]], confronting the Stranger|<ref name="Night of the Stranger" />}}
'''Wizards of the Night Spirit''' were followers of the [[Night Spirit/Legends|Night Spirit]] who were formerly from the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. They came into [[Ewok–Night Spirit War|conflict]] with the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]], who banished the wizards from Endor to another [[Unidentified world (Stranger)|world]]. Eventually, an [[Eclipse/Legends|eclipse]] opened a rift in [[Realspace/Legends|space]] through which one wizard, the [[Stranger]], escaped. The wizard returned to Endor and stole the [[Sunstar/Legends|Sunstar]] from [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]], using it to reopen the rift so that the rest of the wizards could speed through. After a decisive [[Battle of Thorn Forest|battle]], the wizards were defeated and pushed back across the rift and back to their otherworld.<ref name="Night of the Stranger" />
